### **Vi satsar på dig**


Hos oss får du:

* kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och möjlighet att fördjupa dig
* en kultur av kunskapsdelning, trygghet och gemenskap
* kollegor som gärna sparrar, coachar och delar med sig
* möjlighet att påverka både teknik och arbetssätt i uppdrag
* ett centralt och trevligt kontor i Uppsala där man trivs


Tillsammans bygger vi hållbara digitala lösningar som skapar värde – för kund, samhälle och framtid.

### **Om oss**


Omegapoint är norra Europas ledande konsultbolag inom säker digital innovation. Vi är över 800 medarbetare i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Örebro, Västerås, Enköping, Uppsala och Umeå.

title: Frontend Developer
description:
**Rollen**


AB Regin är i en spännande tillväxtfas och vi söker nu nya medarbetare till vårt utvecklingsteam! Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i en dynamisk miljö där din insats gör verklig skillnad. Vi värdesätter innovation, samarbete och personlig utveckling – och vi hoppas att du vill vara med på vår resa mot en mer hållbar framtid.


Vi söker dig som brinner för modern mjukvaruutveckling och vill ta nästa steg i din karriär. Hos Regin får du arbeta med React och andra moderna teknologier, samtidigt som du utvecklar din tekniska skicklighet i ett team där kvalitet och samarbete står i centrum.

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**

* Designa och utveckla användarvänliga och responsiva webbapplikationer med React och Typescript
* Implementera UI från grunden utifrån wireframes, designskisser och användarfeedback
* Arbeta med CSS och state-hantering för att skapa en sömlös användarupplevelse
* Utveckla och underhålla single page applications (SPA)
* Samarbeta med UX-designers och backendutvecklare för att säkerställa helheten i lösningen
* Ha ett öga för detaljer och säkerställa hög kvalitet i både kod och design
* Felsöka, analysera och lösa supportärenden
* Bidra till att utveckla och förbättra våra arbetsprocesser inom webbutveckling

**Vem är du?**


Du är en motiverad och nyfiken person som trivs med att arbeta tillsammans med andra för att nå gemensamma mål. Du ser dig själv som en lagspelare och bidrar gärna till teamets utveckling och framgång.


För dig är det viktigt att ta ansvar och ägandeskap för det du gör – du vill inte bara ha ett jobb, utan just det här jobbet, där du får möjlighet att växa och göra skillnad. Du tar initiativ, är lösningsorienterad och har en stark vilja att utvecklas både som individ och tillsammans med teamet.

**Kvalifikationer**

* 4+ års relevant erfarenhet inom Frontend-utveckling med vana att jobba iterativt med wireframes och användarfeedback
* Gedigen erfarenhet av React och Typescript
* Goda kunskaper i CSS och state-hantering, samt att utveckla single page applications (SPA)
* God webberfarenhet, skarp öga för detaljer och vana att säkerställa hög kvalitet
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift (minst nivå B2)

**Teknisk miljö**


Hos oss får du arbeta med en modern tech-stack som inkluderar:

* React
* Zustand/Redux
* React Query
* GraphQL

**Varför AB Regin?**


På AB Regin får du möjlighet att vara en del av en spännande framtid. Vi utvecklar innovativa lösningar för fastighetsautomation och bidrar till ett mer energieffektivt samhälle. Hos oss arbetar du i en öppen och inspirerande kultur där vi stöttar, utmanar och hjälper varandra att växa.


Vi erbjuder en dynamisk arbetsmiljö med engagerade kollegor, stort inflytande över ditt arbete och en kultur där vi värdesätter samarbete, innovation och hållbarhet.


Om du vill vara med och skapa framtidens hållbara teknik – då är det här rätt plats för dig!


Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande - skicka in din ansökan redan idag och bli en del av vårt team!.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js) - Card team
description:
Dedicated to powering entrepreneurs, Qred is a profitable, fast-growing fintech scale-up bank. In 10 years, we’ve grown from a startup to hitting 1 billion SEK in annual revenue, supporting over 50,000 entrepreneurs and helping create 10,000+ jobs every year. We combine smart tech with real-world experience to make funding simple, fast, and fair for entrepreneurs who need it most.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a core member of our Card Services team, you will own the mission-critical systems defining the Qred VISA experience. This role bridges the gap between high-resiliency financial architecture and the future of AI-driven development, providing end-to-end ownership of features that solve complex cashflow problems. You will be instrumental in Scaling our product across new markets. If you want high-impact ownership in a fast-moving, mission-critical domain, this is it.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Build and maintain highly resilient backend services using Node.js to support massive transaction volumes and real-time payment features.
* Drive the evolution of our AI-SDLC, leveraging advanced tooling to accelerate delivery speed without compromising on security or performance.
* Ensure system stability by taking full ownership of automated testing and DevOps practices within a microservices environment.
* Translate business requirements into technical specifications, collaborating closely with Product Managers and Tech Leads to drive Fintech innovation.


**What We're Looking For**
 We are looking for a senior engineer with a structured approach to problem-solving and a drive to build scalable frameworks. You should be motivated by technical precision and thrive in environments where you can drive alignment across teams and maintain a high bar for code quality.
   

  

**Qualification**
* A few years of experience in backend development, specifically with Node.js.
* Knowledge of AWS cloud infrastructure and microservice architecture.
* Proven experience with RESTful APIs and modern DevOps/Continuous Delivery pipelines.
* Background in Fintech, banking, or regulated environments, specifically within cards and payments, is highly prefferd.
* Strong interest or experience in AI-augmented development and integrating LLM-based agents into production systems.


**Why Qred?**
 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, responsibility for the whole development chain, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

**One last thing**
 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. While we encourage a hybrid setup, we do expect you to be at least three days per week at the office. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Frontend Software Engineer
description:
**Description**
 Welcome to SSC Space (formerly Swedish Space Corporation), the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
   

  

 We offer specialized expertise in satellite communications, spacecraft consulting services, and rocket and balloon systems. SSC Space has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications, enabling customers to achieve their spacecraft mission goals. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, northern Sweden.
   

  

 We are now looking for front-end engineers who are passionate about creating excellent user experiences and writing high-quality, maintainable code. This is a unique opportunity to help define and build our internal and client-facing platforms.
   

  

**Requirements**
 As an engineer at SSC Space, you will work on implementing new features and help shape the technical approach to our front-end stack. We value engineers who enjoy solving challenging problems, delivering practical solutions, and growing their expertise in a collaborative environment.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
* B.S. Computer Science or Computer/Software Engineering, or equivalent experience.
* Deep experience with React and its eco system, leveraging modern paradigms such as Hooks, Context API, and Redux to build scalable user interfaces.
* Exposure to full-stack development with a willingness to work across the stack.
* Experience developing and querying RESTful APIs.
* Strong communication and teamwork abilities.
* Minimum3-5 years of relevant working experience.


**Additional Experience We Value**
* Proficiency or interest in learning new languages, specifically C-oriented languages or Go.
* Solid understanding of database design, optimization, and management.
* Experience with software development best practices including Scrum, DevOps and CI/CD Methodologies.
* Experience with containerization and orchestration tools such as Docker and Kubernetes.
* Interest in or experience working with AI-assisted development tools such as GitHub Copilot, agentic AI workflows, or similar.
* Understanding of microservice architecture.
* Experience in the space industry.


**Responsibilities**
 We believe you take ownership of your work and care about building reliable, well-functioning solutions for both users and your team. You combine analytical thinking with a practical approach to problem solving. You take ownership of your work, drive tasks forward, and are comfortable working with complex technical details. You can work independently when needed, but also collaborate effectively with others. You have experience contributing to production applications and value writing maintainable, reliable code.
   

  

**As a Frontend Software Engineer, You Will**
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and develop user-facing applications supporting a range of mission-critical systems.
* Contribute to the modernization and migration of legacy systems into scalable, maintainable architectures.
* Build and maintain high-quality, performant code for both new and existing applications.
* Improve system observability through implementation of monitoring, logging, and alerting solutions.
* Support internal tools and platforms related to scheduling, antenna control, orbital launch services, and emerging technologies.
* Enhance development workflows through automated testing and streamlined deployment processes.
* Promote and contribute to agile methodologies, fostering continuous improvement within the team.
* Support and deliver reliable solutions for customer missions.


**Benefits**
 WE OFFER YOU
   

  

* A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.


**Additional Benefits**
* In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
* Health benefits such as voluntary health insurance and regular health checks for eligible employees.
* Access to a benefit bike through a tax-efficient leasing program.
* Support for employee-driven activities that promote connection, health, and culture across teams.
* Collective Agreement, including good pensions plans, parental pay and insurance.


 LOCATION
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position based at our office in either Solna or Kiruna.
   

  

 FURTHER INFORMATION
   

  

 For questions regarding employment terms or union-related matters, you are welcome to contact our union representatives:
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer: SverigesIngenjorer-AF@sscspace.com
   

  

 Unionen: unionen@sscspace.com
   

  

  

  

 NEXT STEP
   

  

 If this opportunity sparks your interest, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We review applications continuously and will conduct interviews throughout the process.
   

  

 You can submit your application up until 2026-05-10, which is the latest possible date for consideration.
   

  

 Please note, however, that the position may be filled before this date, and the advertisement may therefore close earlier. This allows us to manage the process efficiently and give each application the attention it deserves.
   

  

 When applying, please include your CV. While you are welcome to include a brief personal note or letter, our evaluation will primarily focus on your skills and qualifications as outlined in your CV, ensuring a fair and unbiased recruitment process.
   

  

 This position requires approved pre-employment screening. These controls are based on the role that you will fulfill within the company. Additional requirements regarding citizenship may apply.
   

  

 WE HELP EARTH BENEFIT FROM SPACE
   

  

 SSC Space is a leading global provider of advanced space services, with more than 50 years of experience. We help space organizations, research institutes, commercial and institutional actors from all over the world to get access to space.
   

  

 With local presence on all continents and about 750 committed employees, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications and satellite control services, spacecraft operations, rocket and balloon systems, launch services and flight test services, as well as engineering, operations and consultancy services for space missions.
   

  

 We help Earth benefit from Space. Learn more at sscspace.com

title: Backend Software Developer - Web3
description:
Are you a Backend Software Engineer with a keen interest in everything Web3 and how this can be applied to iGaming? Then this is the role for you! We are looking for a Software Engineer to help us in the beginning of our journey to bring new and innovative iGaming products and brands to the market, leveraging the exciting possibilities provided by Web3 concepts and technologies.
 


**The Wow** 

 As s Backend Developer you will be responsible for the server-side code and APIs of our web applications. You will work closely with our development team to ensure system consistency and to create a great user experience.
 


**A taster of what you will be involved with** 
* Participate in sprint planning, task estimation, development testing, code reviews and deploying software
* Maintenance and improving of existing software
* Designing code, unit tests
* Managing SQL and NoSQL data models


 What we are looking for
 * 5+ years as a backend developer
* 5+ years of developing backend systems, preferably in .NET/C# with knowledge in ASP.NET Web API
* Proficiency in SQL Server or Postgres; both in writing queries and tuning performance
* Experience with blockchain integrations
* Experience in design and implementation of distributed and multi-tier systems, understanding SOA principles and service oriented environments (multiple services, multiple machines)
* Knowledge in automated testing and continuous integration
* Use of agile/lean methodologies for continuous delivery and improvement
* Experience of coaching and mentoring junior colleagues
* Confident in both written and spoken English


 Extra awesome if you have
 * NoSQL databases (Couchbase)
* CRM Systems
* .NET Core
* Knowledge in HTML 5, CSS, JS, jQuery and/or JavaScript frameworks
* Distributed microservice-based architectures
* We don’t expect you to be an expert in all of these technologies but would anticipate experience with some combined with a curiosity for others Docker, Consul, etcD, Kubernetes, Elasticsearch, Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ



  
 


**What we offer** 

 Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: System Developer
description:
Acne Studios is a progressive luxury house and through collaboration and curiosity, we set high aspirations and strive for excellence. We value everyone’s contribution and embrace feedback to develop ourselves and others. We aim to minimize our environmental impact across all our operations and to address societal challenges in the way we conduct our business.
   

  

 As a System Developer in our Stockholm headquarters, you’ll join a skilled development team working at the intersection of fashion, retail, and technology. This role is ideal for someone with 1-2 years of experience in Dynamics 365 F&O and Azure integrations who is ready to take the next step and deepen their expertise in a dynamic, global environment.
   

  

 You’ll collaborate closely with senior developers, testers, IT Business Partners, and teams across the company. Together, you’ll design, build, and maintain solutions that support our global operations - from purchasing and logistics to retail and finance. Our tech stack includes Dynamics 365 F&O, Azure integration services, and Azure DevOps.
   

  

 CULTURE OF COLLABORATION
   

  

 We firmly believe that when you feel supported, included, and trusted, it enables you to enjoy your work and thrive in it. You will be a part of a team of colleagues with diverse roles and backgrounds, each with their unique skills and experiences.
   

  

 WHAT YOU WILL DO
   

  

 As System Developer your main contribution will be to build and maintain solutions that support our global operations. You will report to the Head of System Development & Business Relations. You will play a vital role in the development team where you will:
   

  

* Develop, test, deploy, and maintain software solutions and integrations that align with our architectural and coding standards
* Grow your craft with coaching from experienced senior developers
* Contribute to solution design and take an active role in technical discussions
* Write clean, structured, and well‑documented code
* Participate in code reviews and offer constructive, thoughtful feedback
* Troubleshoot and resolve defects, performance challenges, and technical debt
* Partner with IT Business Partners to assess needs and estimate development efforts
* Provide third‑line support and help diagnose production issues
* Collaborate closely with QA to refine testing practices and shape effective test strategies
* Highlight risks, gaps, and potential business impact throughout development
* Continuously seek ways to improve our tools, processes, and systems
* Share knowledge generously and contribute to a collaborative, learning‑focused culture


 WHO YOU ARE
   

  

 You have high aspirations and focus on details that create substantial impact. You enjoy working as a team and you embrace feedback to develop yourself and others. You are curious and thrive in a dynamic environment. Cooperation, respect, and clear communication are important, along with your ambition to learn and grow. If these qualities speak to you, we would love to have you on our team.
   

  

 Specific personal qualities for this role:
   

  

* You enjoy solving problems and understanding how systems support business processes
* You’re driven by improving how things work and creating clarity in complexity
* You feel comfortable asking questions, sharing ideas, and collaborating closely with others
* You’re eager to grow your skills - and you value a workplace where clarity, simplicity, and quality truly matter


 Specific experience and knowledge for this role:
   

  

* 1-2 years of hands‑on experience with Dynamics 365 F&O development (X++)
* Experience with Azure integrations is a strong plus
* A solid understanding of software development principles and coding standards
* Experience working in - or supporting - processes within retail is an advantage
* A structured, solution‑oriented approach to work
* Curiosity and an interest in AI, automation, and innovation
* A collaborative mindset and a genuine interest in learning and contributing
* Fluency in English


 What matters most to us is not whether you master all the listed knowledge and skills. We are dedicated to recognising the potential in each individual. We embrace diversity of people as well as ideas and viewpoints and encourage everyone's individual expression of their own identity.

title: Global Banking & Markets – Software Engineer (C++) – Associate – Stockholm
description:
**Job Description**
**Goldman Sachs**
 The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. is a leading global investment banking, securities and investment management firm that provides a wide range of financial services to a substantial and diversified client base that includes corporations, financial institutions, governments, and individuals. Founded in 1869, the firm is headquartered in New York and maintains offices in all major financial centers around the world.
   

  

**Divisional Overview**
 Global Banking and Markets division provides financing, advisory, risk distribution, and hedging services for institutional and corporate clients. Within Global Banking and Markets, our equities professionals focus on delivering ideas, execution, and liquidity to a wide array of clients trading the entire range of equity products, including physical shares, ETFs, synthetic shares, baskets, options, and other derivatives. Our engineers play important roles in several areas within the division. Some engineers build automated trading platforms and algorithms for the firm and its clients, taking an active part in the increasing shift from voice to electronic trading. Others sit on trading desks, creating cutting-edge derivative pricing models, and developing empirical models to provide insight into market behavior. Still others develop systems and processes that assist with making the entire trade life cycle more seamless.
   

  

**GSET Engineering**
 Goldman Sachs Electronic Trading (GSET) offers a best-in-class comprehensive suite of trading strategies to help clients achieve their trading objectives and navigate a variety of market conditions leveraging historical analyses, quantitative models, and real-time market information. These strategies are built on a highly distributed, scalable, low latency trading platform, which processes billions of transactions daily in the low microsecond range, with minimal jitter. Our engineers are responsible for designing, building, and maintaining this trading platform as well as the strategies running on the platform, in a collaborative environment. The software our engineers write is of a very high standard: it is client and market facing with real time SLAs and can have high financial and regulatory impact. Some engineers focus on implementing the platform, its surrounding ecosystem and order management workflows, writing highly performant code and optimizing its interaction with the hardware and infrastructure it is executing on. Others work on building the trading models, signals and algorithmic logic which constitute the trading strategies.
   

  

**Who Are We Looking For**
 We are looking for strong engineers in the GSET Platform and Connectivity space. The team is part of building one of GSET’s major trading platforms which processes billions of dollars’ worth of trades every day. The team writes highly performant code using best-in-class software development processes and seeks to continuously improve all aspects of the system. We push our own boundaries and challenge the status quo in others. Our main goal is to create performant, scalable and resilient trading systems through best-in-class software change management. We want technical people that communicate well and have a passion for efficiency and automation, continually looking for ways to improve. As part of this effort, they will be expected to collaborate with colleagues across the world.
   

  

**Your Impact**
 Working as a member of the GSET Platform and Connectivity team, you will play an active role in ensuring our trading applications remain best-in-class. You will be responsible for maintaining and developing the platform used for accessing equity exchanges and other trading platforms around the world, implementing solutions related to order routing, dissemination of market information, controls evaluation, and the transaction platform that supports these functions – all while maintaining our low latency performance profile. Together with the team you will tackle complex software engineering problems in an environment where we collaborate across business functions to deliver new solutions every day.
   

  

 The ideal candidate brings customer service excellency in their approach and have a solid understanding of distributed software systems.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or related field
* Productive in programming in an object-oriented language
* C++ programming experience
* Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
* Ability to challenge status quo and automate manual tasks
* Ability to drive complex change to completion in collaboration and independently
* Knowledge of basic networking concepts, topologies, and technologies
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Strong communication skills and ability to work in a team


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience of low-latency systems, including messaging and network protocols
* Working knowledge of order management systems
* Knowledge of financial markets


**About Goldman Sachs**
 At Goldman Sachs, we commit our people, capital and ideas to help our clients, shareholders and the communities we serve to grow. Founded in 1869, we are a leading global investment banking, securities and investment management firm. Headquartered in New York, we maintain offices around the world.
   

  

 We believe who you are makes you better at what you do. We're committed to fostering and advancing diversity and inclusion in our own workplace and beyond by ensuring every individual within our firm has a number of opportunities to grow professionally and personally, from our training and development opportunities and firmwide networks to benefits, wellness and personal finance offerings and mindfulness programs. Learn more about our culture, benefits, and people at GS.com/careers.
   

  

 We’re committed to finding reasonable accommodations for candidates with special needs or disabilities during our recruiting process. Learn more: https://www.goldmansachs.com/careers/footer/disability-statement.html
   

  

 © The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc., 2023. All rights reserved.
   

  

 Goldman Sachs is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, veterans status, disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.

title: Software Developer at Monitum
description:
Do you want your code to create real-world impact – for people, business, and society? At Monitum, you’ll join a product-driven development team where your work directly enables new business opportunities and strengthens a trusted platform used by hundreds of thousands of users. Our solutions are used through channel partnerships with companies such as telecom operators, loan brokers, and insurance providers – creating both technical complexity and meaningful impact. This is an opportunity for a developer who enjoys combining technical excellence with a business mindset, while being part of something that truly matters.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Software Developer at Monitum, you’ll be a key contributor in a development team of 8 developers and part of a company of 24 colleagues in total. You’ll report to the Head of Development and work close to both product and business. Your main focus will be to build and ship new, high-impact functionality that drives customer value and supports the company’s growth in Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR).
   

  

 You will work across the full-stack and take shared ownership of the service layer, ensuring it remains secure, scalable, and sustainable as the product and organization grow. The role combines hands-on development with a strong focus on quality, security, and long-term maintainability.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Include**
* Developing and launching new features across the full-stack (TypeScript, React, NestJS)
* Writing clean, maintainable code using TDD and robust automated testing
* Identifying and mitigating security risks in both application and infrastructure
* Collaborating closely with the team to continuously improve development workflows, tools, and architecture using technologies such as NX and Kubernetes


**YOUR PROFILE**
 You are a growth-oriented and self-driven developer who takes responsibility for the whole product, not just isolated pieces of code. You value collaboration highly and approach your work with a strong sense of accountability. Being humble comes naturally to you — you enjoy helping others and believe that the best results are achieved when the team succeeds together.
   

  

**You Have**
* 5+ years of professional experience in full-stack development
* Expert-level knowledge of TypeScript
* Strong backend experience with NestJS (or deep expertise in IOC containers and dependency injection)
* Professional experience with React
* A strong understanding of automated testing (integration and acceptance) and a TDD-first mindset
* A business-centric approach to development, understanding how technical decisions impact MRR and customer retention
* Fluency in English


**Bonus Points For**
* Knowledge of Kubernetes (k8s) and Helm
* Experience working with monorepos and the NX build system
* Proficiency in Swedish


**About Monitum**
 Monitum has over a decade of experience building secure, business-critical solutions through close collaboration between development, product, and business. We are a mature startup on a clear journey towards scale-up, with strong momentum, a stable product, and a clear long-term ambition.
   

  

 The culture is defined by high professionalism combined with genuine work joy. We value how you show up just as much as what you deliver, and we build teams with strong people, not just strong CVs. Collaboration, openness, and supporting each other in everyday work are core to how we succeed.
   

  

 You’ll be part of a dynamic environment with strong team spirit, close access to decision-making, and a shared motivation to contribute to something bigger than individual tasks.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* Competitive compensation and attractive benefits
* Flexibility and a healthy work-life balance thanks to a trust-based, sustainable approach to work
* A modern technical environment
* Continuous professional development in a close-knit, experienced team with real product impact


**Additional Information**
* Work Authorization: Sweden work authorization is a precondition of employment. Monitum will not consider candidates who require sponsorship for a work-authorized visa
* Relocation: No relocation assistance is provided for this role. Candidates must reside in Stockholm, Sweden


**YOUR APPLICATION**
 In this recruitment, Monitum is collaborating with Wise.
   

  

 We do not accept applications via email. Instead, you can easily apply with your CV or LinkedIn profile at wise.se. We use competency-based recruitment as our method, striving for a more potential-based match. We therefore welcome applicants of different backgrounds, ages and experiences, as we know that diversity enriches us and makes us stronger and smarter as an organization.
   

  

 If you have questions about the role or the recruitment process, please contact the responsible recruitment consultant: christian.nodelijk@wise.se.
   

  

 Interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis, and the position may be filled before the final application date.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application.

title: Software Engineer - Zalando Logistics Technology (ZEOS) - All Genders
description:
Over the last years, we learned that solving fulfilment related challenges for the good of our customers helps us to fuel the growth of our platform. With more partners in Partner Program and Connected Retail joining our platform, we have been developing and testing additional fulfilment services tailored to their needs.
   

  

 The ZEOS Logistics department is responsible for all partner-facing Zalando Logistics Solutions. By unifying and collaborating these services under a single umbrella, we provide a more holistic approach to delivering the optimal fulfilment solution to meet our partners' needs and leverage common services to enable partner program growth.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer in ZEOS Logistics, you will develop and operate business-critical applications for our partners and internal stakeholders that process tens of thousands of events per second powering the critical partner-facing backend APIs and web applications of the partner fulfilment domain. You will work with tools and technologies such as Java, Kotlin, PostgreSQL, AWS, Kubernetes, and Elasticsearch in building high-performance, low-latency systems to create an impact on customers and partners.
   

  

**INCLUSIVE BY DESIGN**
 At Zalando, our vision is to be the starting point for fashion - one that is inclusive by design. We only assess candidates based on qualifications, merit, and business needs. We welcome applications from people of all gender identities, sexual orientations, personal expressions, racial identities, ethnicities, religious beliefs, and disability statuses. We only want to know why you’re great for this role, so please avoid including your picture, age, and marital status in your CV as well.
   

  

 We want to provide you with a great candidate experience. Please feel free to inform us of any accommodations you may need, so we can best support and assist you throughout the hiring process.
   

  

 do.BETTER - our diversity & inclusion strategy
   

  

 https //corporate.zalando.com/en/diversity-inclusion
   

  

 Our employee resource groups
   

  

 https //corporate.zalando.com/en/diversity-inclusion/our-employee-resource-groups
   

  

**WHAT WE’D LOVE YOU TO DO (AND LOVE DOING)...**
* Build and operate large-scale data streaming and processing applications serving fulfilment process relevant data with the latency of tens of milliseconds in magnitude to Zalando partners in using technologies such as Java, Kotlin, Postgres, and Elasticsearch.
* Use a state-of-the-art software development methodology.
* Be part of a newly established engineering team in Stockholm and help to foster an environment of continuous learning.


**WE’D LOVE TO MEET YOU IF..** 
 .
   

  

  

* 5+ years of experience as a Software Engineer in developing APIs and high-volume data streaming and processing systems with either Java or Kotlin.
* Initial hands-on experience with SQL storage technologies.
* Familiarity with AWS, Kubernetes, and Elasticsearch is in addition a plus.
* "You build it, you run it" approach you have had a first experience in managing services end-to-end, from developing to deploying to monitoring and incident support is a big plus.
* Passion for working in an agile, cross-functional team, iterating quickly during the product development cycle. As well as, ability to communicate and collaborate effectively with business stakeholders, product managers, and engineering peers.


**OUR OFFER**
 Zalando provides a range of benefits, please ask your Talent Acquisition Partner to learn more about what we offer.
   

  

**About Zalando**
 It’s the perfect time to join Zalando on our journey, from being a pioneer in the world of e-commerce, to the starting point for fashion in Europe. We connect customers, brands, and partners across 23 markets.
   

  

 Help us drive digital and sustainable solutions for fashion, logistics, advertising and research, bringing head-to-toe fashion to almost 49 million active customers through a team of diverse skill-sets, cultural backgrounds, and interests.
   

  

 Our values https //jobs.zalando.com/en/our-founding-mindset
   

  

 do.More - our sustainability strategy https //corporate.zalando.com/en/sustainability Follow us on Instagram instagram.com/insidezalando
   

  

 Please note that all applications must be completed using the online form - we do not accept applications via email.

title: System Developer - Core Team
description:
RaySearch develops a suite of cancer care software, and we are now looking to add more talented developers to our oncology information system RayCare, specifically to our Core team which is responsible for framework development.
   

  

**About RayCare**
 RayCare is a client-server application that runs on premises at many clinics all over the world. RayCare takes care of and helps clinical staff to coordinate their work at the clinic. For example, workflow management, patient chart details and treatment management. RayCare is an innovative oncology information system (OIS) designed to support the complex challenges of modern oncology clinics. It is developed to streamline workflows in cancer clinics to facilitate efficient care faster to more patients. RayCare is used by all staff at the clinic, e.g., physicians, physicists, treatment planners etc. and is used in all steps of patient care, from registration to radiation treatment at the treatment machine and for treatment follow-up. RayCare is integrated with RayStation and its treatment tools but also with external products and supports communication via HL7 as well as DICOM.
   

  

 In the Core team you will mainly work with developing and improving our mission-critical event sourcing and micro service framework as well as installation and security aspects for the RayCare product.
   

  

 As a part of the Core team, you have the possibility to work with a variety of interesting and challenging tasks together with talented colleagues and contribute to evolving the platform and ensuring that it meets the high requirements on patient safety, robustness, performance, and availability.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a core team developer, you will be part of designing and implementing a robust and modern software platform for our oncology information system. We believe you are a hands-on system developer with great problem-solving skills and a meticulous and structured approach. RayCare has high demands on sustainable software development ensuring excellent code quality and maintaining best practices. In your everyday work, you continuously contribute to good overall software design with the goal of achieving a highly structured large scale software product. You are always open to discuss overall design within and between teams, valuing collaboration and your colleagues input to find the best solution for the problem at hand.
   

  

**Your profile**
 You have excellent analytic skills and can identify different components of problems, see connections between them, and understand the impact of various proposed solutions. You take responsibility for your work, ensuring that nothing is overlooked when implementing new functionality. You value collaboration, share knowledge with you team, and take pride in delivering high-quality code that supports the teams’ and organization's goals.
   

  

**Requirements**
* M.Sc. in Computer Science, Engineering physics or equivalent academic degree
* Minimum five years of backend development experience with complex products
* Expertise in C#/.NET
* Proficient with SQL Server
* Experience with client-server based systems
* Knowledge of domain-driven design
* Knowledge of event-sourcing
* Knowledge of CQRS/CQS


**Meriting**
* Experience of working in an agile environment
* Experience from the MedTech-industry or other regulated industries
* Experience of framework development of mission critical systems
* Experience from microservice architectures
* High performance computing (multi-threaded/async software)
* Messaging systems such as RabbitMQ
* Experience with security technologies such as; OpenID Connect, certificates, OpenIddict


**Our Culture**
 Culture at RaySeach is the driving force behind our organization, where everything we do is driven by a shared passion for innovation and the fight against cancer. Our dedication is reflected in our ability to deliver exceptional results, pay close attention to detail, and consistently go the extra mile. Our employees stand out as experts in their field, driven by a relentless focus on solving problems - no matter how complex. At RaySearch, we take pride in leading the way in cancer treatment, leveraging cutting-edge technology to develop innovative solutions that make a real difference in patient care.
   

  

**Our Offer**
 At RaySearch, we offer a diverse and inclusive work environment, fostering openness, sincerity, and collaboration. Located in Hagastaden, Stockholm's Life Science Hub, our modern and creative workspace includes an in-house gym, yoga, and social activities like ping pong, table football, and regular after-work events. Our bistro serves a fantastic lunch buffet, and we offer morning- and afternoon-fika every day. Our rooftop terrace also provides a stunning 360-degree view of Stockholm, enhancing the work experience. All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package.
   

  

**Application**
 Please apply to the position through the application form below. We do not accept applications by e-mail. Selection and interviews will be ongoing.

title: Sr. Software Engineer - Nexus
description:
Vi bygger Nordens största streamingtjänst som når i snitt cirka åtta miljoner nordbor i veckan genom TV4 Play och vår finska motsvarighet MTV Katsomo. Inom Product & Tech utvecklar vi de tekniska lösningarna som bland annat gör det möjligt att streama innehåll, söka och få rekommendationer – så att människor kan ta del av nyheter, sport och underhållning, när och var de vill.
   

  

 Nexus är ett produktplattformsteam som ansvarar för många av TV4 Plays mest centrala backend-tjänster – bland annat innehållskatalogen och centrala API-gateways. Tjänsterna utgör grunden som övriga produktteamen bygger vidare på, och som behöver fungera tillförlitligt i stor skala dygnet runt.
   

  

 Som Senior Software Engineer i Nexus ansvarar du för centrala backend-tjänster med höga krav på stabilitet och skalbarhet. Du designar API:er, driver arkitekturbeslut och bygger genom agentisk utveckling.
   

  

**Ansvarsområden**
* Bygga och underhålla skalbara, högpresterande backend-tjänster skrivna i Go i en cloud native microservice-arkitektur som teamet designar och äger.
* Agentisk utveckling är central i vårt arbete – vi arbetar idag med Claude Code och OpenAI Codex. Alla förväntas arbeta aktivt med att optimera våra arbetssätt kring dagens och framtidens AI-verktyg.
* Aktivt delta i och forma teamets infrastruktur på AWS – från arkitekturbeslut till implementering.
* Skriva designdokument och tekniska specifikationer som grund för välförankrade beslut.
* Äga observability och monitorering av de tjänster du bygger och ansvarar för.


**Vi söker dig som**
* Är en erfaren Software Engineer med minst fem års erfarenhet av backend-utveckling som kan se helheten kring dina tekniska lösningar och hur de passar in i ett större sammanhang.
* Har erfarenhet av snabbrörlig miljö med höga krav på självledarskap.
* Förstår att de flesta tekniska beslut sällan är svartvita, och söker aktivt rätt balans.
* Har anammat AI som verktyg för att lyfta din och ditt teams leverans.
* Nördar ner dig på riktigt när något fångar dig - oavsett om det handlar om distribuerade system, AI, eller matlagning. Du blir rastlös när du slutar lära dig.
* Är en god kommunikatör och kan förklara komplexa koncept på ett enkelt vis.


**Nuvarande Tech Stack**
* Backend: Go
* Moln: AWS
* Databaser: bl.a PostgreSQL, OpenSearch/ElasticSearch och DynamoDB
* DevOps & tooling: GitHub Actions, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Terraform
* Utvecklarverktyg: Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, CLI/MCP mot andra tools
* Produktivitet: Linear, Notion, Slack


****Vad TV4 erbjuder dig****
* Kort väg från idé till beslut. Vi är en senior tech-organisation med hög autonomi för team och individ.
* En kultur som värdesätter hållbar kod framför snabba genvägar. Vi prioriterar långsiktiga lösningar.
* Du loggar ut på riktigt efter jobbet. Vi har dedikerad on-call med frivilligt deltagande - du förväntas inte vara tillgänglig utanför arbetstid.
* Fint kontor i TV4-huset (nära Gärdets tunnelbana) med eget gym, parkeringsgarage, restaurang och takterrass.
* Kollektivavtal, tjänstepension, försäkringar och friskvårdsbidrag.
* Valfri telefon, MacBook Pro samt rabatter via Benify.


**Praktisk Info**
* TV4 är office-first – vi arbetar på vårt kontor 4 dagar i veckan.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med 6 månaders provanställning.
* Facklig tillhörighet: Unionen. Kontakta unionen@tv4.se för frågor.
* Bakgrundskontroll ingår i processen.


 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Testutvecklare inom AI till Knowit i Stockholm
description:
*Vill du vara en del av ett modigt och transparent bolag som levererar innovativa lösningar till våra kunder? Knowit i Stockholm växlar nu upp och behöver utöka med fler teknisk testare, gärna med erfarenheter inom AI-stödd utveckling - välkommen till en naturlig miljö att ständigt utvecklas och växa inom!*
**Vad kommer du att göra?**
 Vi söker dig som vill ha en nyckelroll i utvecklingen av våra kunders projekt och digitala produkter. I rollen som teknisk testare kommer du att vara länken mellan slutanvändare och utvecklingsteam där ditt fokus ligger på att effektivt kvalitetssäkra leveranser. Med din förmåga att identifiera problem i ett tidigt skede och återkoppla dessa i utvecklingscykeln, bidrar du med en hög kvalitet och verifierar att leveransen blir optimal.
   

  

 På Knowit kommer du att ha stöd av fantastiska kollegor och deras kunskap inom hela kedjan från kravhantering, automationsutveckling och test, inte minst i AI-drivna miljöer. Hos oss får du växa och utvecklas i en flexibel organisation som värderar gemenskap och kompetensutveckling högt.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi tror att du antingen redan har din bakgrund inom testautomation eller att du idag jobbar som utvecklare och är intresserad av de kvalitetssäkrande momenten i utvecklingscykeln. Du har flera års erfarenhet av IT-branschen och har därmed skapat dig en stor förståelse kring digitala utvecklingsprocesser och produktutveckling som helhet.
   

  

 Som person har du en förmåga att både se helheten, ha kvalitetsfokus och arbeta med de små detaljerna. För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är en målfokuserad person som drivs av att ta dig an problem - både tekniska och relationella - på ett både strukturerat och opretentiöst sätt. Du är bra på att fånga upp behov och lyssna aktivt samt att fatta komplexa beslut som driver på framåt.
   

  

 AI är en naturlig del av våra arbetssätt, från interna verktyg till lösningar vi skapar för kund. Vi ser gärna att du har erfarenhet av att jobba med AI, maskininlärning eller beslutsstöd. Det viktigaste är ändå att du är nyfiken på hur tekniken kan användas på riktigt - i vardagen, i teamet och i leveranserna.
   

  

 Exempel på kunskaper och erfarenheter som vi tror är nyttiga för rollen:
   

  

* Kunna koda i något av de vanligaste språken: Python, Java, C#, JavaScript etc.
* Ha erfarenhet av automationsramverk som Playwright, Selenium, Robot Framework, Appium, Cypress eller motsvarande
* Van att arbeta i GitHub, Bitbucket, TFS/Azure DevOps eller motsvarande
* Intresse för prompt-driven utveckling, t ex GitHub CoPilot


 Du, precis som vi, tycker det är viktigt att ha roligt tillsammans på jobbet och utvecklas i en organisation där transparens och gemenskap står i centrum. Då våra kunder pratar svenska behöver du behärska båda språken i tal och skrift.

title: Mjukvaruutvecklare inom försvarsindustri
description:
Vill du arbeta med teknik i framkant – samtidigt som du gör en verklig samhällsinsats? Hos oss på
 **Knowit Connectivity** 
 får du chansen att utveckla avancerade systemlösningar för Sveriges försvar och totalförsvar. Vi söker nu dig som är erfaren mjukvaruutvecklare och som vill arbeta i en konsultroll och kombinera teknisk utmaning med ett meningsfullt uppdrag.
   

  

**Därför ska du jobba inom försvarssektorn**
 Försvarssektorn är inne i en expansiv fas och spelar en avgörande roll för Sveriges och Europas säkerhet. Tillsammans med ledande aktörer inom försvarsindustrin utvecklar vi på Knowit robusta, säkra och tillförlitliga system som klarar hårda krav – tekniskt, regulatoriskt och säkerhetsmässigt.
   

  

 Att jobba hos oss innebär att du får:
   

  

* Arbeta med samhällsbärande teknik där cybersäkerhet, tillförlitlighet och realtidskrav står i fokus.
* Bidra till utvecklingen av kritiska system för bland annat kommunikation, ledningsstöd och sensorer.
* Möjlighet att påverka teknikval och arkitektur i komplexa och långsiktiga projekt.
* En trygg arbetsgivare med starka samarbeten inom svensk och europeisk försvarsindustri.


**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet som utvecklare inom C++, gärna inom inbyggda system eller realtidssystem
* God vana av arbete i Linux-miljö
* Erfarenhet av end-to-end-utveckling – från design och implementation till test, verifiering och dokumentation
* Svenskt medborgarskap är ett krav samt att du genomför och godkänns i en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll.
* God kommunikationsförmåga på både svenska och engelska.


 Extra plus om du har:
   

  

* Tidigare erfarenhet från försvarssektorn
* Arbetat med ADA
* Erfarenhet av testning på flera nivåer – enhetstest, integrationstest, systemtest
* Erfarenhet av arbete med framtagning av krav samt kravanalys


**Vad vi erbjuder dig**
 Hos Knowit Connectivity får du det bästa av två världar: tryggheten från en etablerad organisation – och friheten att påverka, bidra och växa. Vi erbjuder:
   

  

* Utveckling i teknikens absoluta framkant, ofta i samarbete med våra partners inom försvar, rymd och säkerhet.
* Ett team av engagerade, lösningsorienterade kollegor med passion för teknik och samhällsnytta.
* En kultur där du blir sedd, hörd och uppmuntrad att ta plats
* Regelbundna aktiviteter såsom tech-forum, workshops, lunch & learns, gemensamma resor och afterworks.


**Om Knowit Connectivity**
 Vi är en del av
 **Knowit** 
 – ett av Nordens ledande IT- och teknikbolag med fokus på att bygga ett hållbart och mänskligt samhälle. Inom Connectivity jobbar vi med systemutveckling i teknikens framkant, och vi har lång erfarenhet av avancerade lösningar inom bland annat
 **försvar, telekom, fordon och industri** 
 .
   

  

 Vi har förmånen att samarbeta med några av Sveriges mest tongivande aktörer inom
 **försvar och säkerhet** 
 . Tillsammans skapar vi lösningar som stärker vår beredskap och skyddar det vi alla värnar om.
   

  

**Ansök nu – gör skillnad på riktigt**
 Är du redo att sätta din kompetens i arbete för något större? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag och bli en del av ett team som inte bara bygger teknik – utan trygghet.
